data.title: Research at UT Health San Antonio suggests THC and celecoxib pairing can prevent Alzheimer's; boosts cognition - Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: A study conducted in San Antonio on Jan 28, 2026, found that a combination of THC, the main psychoactive component in cannabis, and celecoxib, a drug commonly used for its anti-inflammatory properties, demonstrated enhanced cognitive functions. This research showcases the increasing understanding of the potential medical advantages of THC, with a focus on its neuroprotective abilities. The study's results highlight the significant impact of combining THC with celecoxib in improving cognition.

data.title: Blue Apron ranked #1 for home cooking by Expert Consumers in 2026 after independent evaluation.
data.description: In a recent assessment conducted by Expert Consumers, Blue Apron has been recognized as the top provider for home-cooked meals. The evaluation, released on January 28, 2026, analyzed various meal delivery services and ranked them based on criteria such as ingredient quality, recipe structure, sourcing transparency, and ease of use. Blue Apron secured the #1 spot, highlighting its commitment to providing high-quality ingredients and user-friendly meal kits. This ranking positions Blue Apron ahead of its competitors in the meal delivery industry.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Meta soars on earnings, Microsoft falters; Tesla's gain reduced due to Elon Musk's spending plans.
data.description: Major companies such as Tesla, Microsoft, and Meta recently reported significant earnings following a pause in the stock market's rise to new record levels. Meta experienced a notable increase in stock value after their earnings report, while Microsoft saw a decline. Additionally, Tesla's stock gain was reduced due to plans announced by Elon Musk regarding company spending. This news comes amidst a generally positive trend in the market and could indicate future shifts in investor confidence.

data.title: Strive purchases 334 BTC, clearing debt from Semler Scientific buy. Now a top 10 Bitcoin holder with 13,132 BTC ($1.17B).
data.description: Strive has recently emerged as one of the ten leading corporate holders of Bitcoin, possessing a sizable treasury amounting to 13,132 BTC. This substantial holding is currently valued at $1.17 billion.

data.title: Limited Spec Automotive in Miami unveils exclusive 2025 Mansory Gronos G-Wagon with 850-horsepower. Premier performance destination in US.
data.description: Exclusive details about the 850-horsepower 2025 Mansory Gronos G-Wagon are being revealed by the exclusive Mansory dealership, the only one in the United States. Located in Miami, Limited Spec Automotive is providing unprecedented insights into the luxurious and powerful vehicle. This dealership serves as the go-to place for top-tier performance enthusiasts and those seeking elite automotive experiences. Don't miss the chance to learn more about this extraordinary vehicle and the unmatched services offered by the premier Mansory dealership in the country.

data.title: Berwyn Group enhances CertiDeath® and CertiCensus® services, leading in population intelligence.
data.description: Independence, Ohio, 28th January 2026 - Today, The Berwyn Group (Berwyn), a top provider of population intelligence services like death audit and locate services, unveiled a major upgrade to its primary offerings, CertiDeath® and CertiCensus®. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as it continues to lead the industry with groundbreaking solutions.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: AMD, Astera, Oklo, Rocket Lab, Tesla drop; Fed meeting starts Tuesday.
data.description: Stock futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped significantly on Monday as companies like AMD, Astera, Oklo, Rocket Lab, and Tesla experienced sharp declines. Investors are closely watching the Federal Reserve's two-day meeting set to begin on Tuesday. The market saw sell-offs in these prominent companies, reflecting a cautious sentiment among traders. The upcoming Fed meeting serves as a key event for market participants, with potential implications for future investment decisions. This market update highlights the fluctuations in key stocks and the significance of the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting for investors.

data.title: Dow rises despite Schumer shutdown call, Trump tariff threats; Burry boosts GameStop. Tesla dips.
data.description: Today, the stock market saw a positive trend with the Dow Jones index increasing despite a threat of new tariffs on Canada by President Trump. Michael Burry made significant contributions to the rise of GameStop while Tesla experienced a decline. The Dow Jones index showed resilience against a potential government shutdown as suggested by Senator Schumer. This event was live covered by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Gold and silver hit record highs, reaching $41 trillion market value, surpassing big tech; gold at $35 trillion and silver $6.1 trillion.
data.description: Gold and silver reached new record highs, with gold hitting $5,100 an ounce and silver rising to $110. The combined market value of these two precious metals now exceeds $41 trillion, as per CompaniesMarketCap.com. Gold holds a market value of around $35 trillion, while silver makes up $6.1 trillion. This surpasses the combined market capitalization of the top 7 tech stocks, such as NVIDIA Corp., Microsoft Corp., Apple Inc, Alphabet Inc, Amazon Inc, and Meta Platforms Inc. The precious metals' market size now dominates global asset rankings. This information can be found in the complete article on Benzinga.com.
